reasoning: Both A and B include the essential facts needed to answer the query correctly: Sheinbaum said far-right sectors in the United States were coordinating with domestic groups against her government, these remarks came after her late-May/June 2026 speech/rally, and she explicitly said she did not believe Donald Trump was responsible. Since both provide enough accurate information from reliable reporting to answer the question correctly, neither clearly outperforms the other.
